modal_new_appt_desc: Manually book a patient who isn't using the Telegram bot. The session will appear on the dashboard and in the schedule.
modal_patient_name_hint: Existing patients appear as you type. Type a new name to create a new patient.
modal_no_slots_hint: No free slots in the next 4 weeks — open Schedule first to mark availability.
modal_contact_hint: Phone or email is required for follow-up if the patient has no Telegram.
modal_notes_placeholder: Reason for visit, referral source, anything you want recorded with this booking…
patients_search_placeholder: Search by name or Telegram ID…
treatment_no_telegram_body: This patient was booked manually — automated follow-up will not be sent. Use the manual feedback section below after the session.
treatment_tongue_placeholder: e.g. Red body, thin yellow coating, slight cracks…
treatment_pulse_placeholder: e.g. Wiry, slightly rapid, thin on right guan…
treatment_diagnosis_placeholder: Your own clinical assessment — pattern, dominant element, channel imbalance, working hypothesis…
treatment_clinical_notes_placeholder: Differential diagnosis, things you ruled out, plan for next sessions…
treatment_autosaves: Auto-saves as you type. Your record — separate from the AI's diagnosis.
treatment_point_input_placeholder: Type point code (e.g. ST36) and press Enter…
treatment_point_count_hint: Press Enter to add, Backspace to remove last
treatment_session_notes_placeholder: Document session observations, treatment modifications, patient responses…
treatment_manual_feedback_hint: Rate improvement manually if patient has no Telegram
profile_timeline_hint: Click any session to view the full clinical record
profile_no_sessions: No sessions found for this patient.
bot_greeting: Hello {name}! Welcome to ZenFlow Clinic. How can I help you today?
bot_no_active_chat: You don't have an active chat with {name} right now.
bot_relay_ended: Your chat session has ended. Use the menu to start a new one.
bot_followup_question: Hi {name}! How are you feeling since your session on {date}?
bot_followup_rate:
On a scale of 1–5, how would you rate your improvement?

5 = Much better
4 = Slightly better
3 = About the same
2 = Slightly worse
1 = Much worse
bot_followup_thanks: Thank you for your feedback! Your therapist will review it.
bot_intake_complete: Thank you! Your intake has been recorded. See you at your appointment.
bot_booking_confirmed: ✅ Your appointment with {therapist} is confirmed for {date} at {time}.
bot_cancel_confirmed: Your appointment on {date} at {time} has been cancelled.
bot_no_appointments: You have no upcoming appointments to cancel.
bot_not_registered: Your Telegram account isn't linked to a ZenFlow therapist profile yet. Please register at the clinic first.
bot_unauthorized: ⚠️ Security notice: you are not authorised to chat with this patient.
bot_registration_code_invalid: That code wasn't found. Please check with your clinic administrator.
sessions_search_placeholder: Search patient name or TCM pattern…
messages_select_patient: Select a patient to view conversation
messages_relay_active: 🟢 Live relay session — messages sent here go via Telegram
messages_no_messages: No messages yet — the patient hasn't sent anything via the relay.
settings_google_desc: Connect your Google account to send lifestyle recommendations to patients directly from your Gmail inbox. Uses OAuth2 with gmail.send and gmail.readonly scopes — no passwords stored, tokens encrypted at rest.
settings_disconnect_confirm: Disconnect Google? Calendar sync and Gmail email delivery will both stop.
settings_bot_activation_desc: Generate a one-time code to link your Telegram account with the therapist bot. Valid for 10 minutes.
bot_intake_q1: What's the main issue or discomfort bringing you in today?
bot_intake_q2: How long have you been experiencing this?
bot_intake_q3: Does it tend to get worse at a particular time of day?
bot_intake_q4: How would you rate the intensity on a scale of 1 to 10?
bot_intake_q5: Have you had any treatment for this before?
bot_what_to_do: What would you like to do, {name}? 🌿
bot_what_to_do_menu: What would you like to do?
bot_what_else: What else can I help you with?
bot_feedback_received: Thank you for the feedback! 🙏 Your therapist will see your update.
bot_no_therapists_contact: No therapists are available at the moment. Please contact the clinic.
bot_no_therapists_later: No therapists are available at the moment. Please try again later.
bot_therapist_assigned:
Your therapist is *{therapist}*.

What would you like to do?
bot_choose_therapist_prompt: First, let's check out your therapist — who would you like to work with?
bot_working_with:
Great! You'll be working with *{name}*. 🌿

What would you like to do?
bot_message_therapist_prompt:
What would you like to say to the therapist?

Type your message below:
bot_which_week: Which week would you like to book?
bot_no_slots_week: No available slots for {week}. Please try another week or contact the clinic directly.
bot_no_hours: No available hours on this day. Please choose another.
bot_intake_prompt:
📅 *{day}* at *{time}* — noted!

Would you like to answer a few quick questions to help optimise your treatment session?
bot_intake_start: Great! A few quick questions to help your acupuncturist prepare. 🌿
bot_booked:
✅ *Appointment confirmed!*
📅 *{day}* at *{time}*

We look forward to seeing you at ZenFlow Clinic 🌿

What else can I help you with?
bot_cancelled_msg:
✅ Appointment on *{day}* at *{time}* has been cancelled.

What else can I help you with?
